markets.question: Portland Timbers vs. Los Angeles Galaxy: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Portland Timbers and Los Angeles Galaxy, scheduled for March 22 at 4:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Portland Timbers and Los Angeles Galaxy each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Minnesota United FC vs. Seattle Sounders FC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Minnesota United FC and Seattle Sounders FC, scheduled for March 22 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Minnesota United FC and Seattle Sounders FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

markets.question: Kash Patel out by March 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Kash Patel ceases to be the Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation for any period of by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An announcement of Patel's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal goes into effect.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the Trump administration, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Antony record the most assists in the 2025-26 UEFA Europa League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who records the most assists through all main tournament rounds of the 2025-26 UEFA Europa League competition.
		
In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official leader as determined by UEFA Europa League rules. If multiple leaders are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025-26 Europa League competition is cancelled, postponed after June 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no official leader declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Kash Patel out by...?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Kash Patel ceases to be the Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation for any period of by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An announcement of Patel's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal goes into effect.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the Trump administration, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
